story.soThat: adapter'ları otomatik register edilsin ve kolayca access edebilleyim

acceptanceCriteria.ac: PdfAdapterFactory oluşturulmuş - OnModuleInit lifecycle hook, adapterRegistry Map, onModuleInit() scan method, getAdapter() cached instance, getRegisteredTemplates() list method
ExcelAdapterFactory oluşturulmuş - Same pattern as PdfAdapterFactory, onModuleInit() scan, getAdapter() cached, getRegisteredAdapters() list
Custom Exceptions oluşturulmuş - AdapterNotFoundException, TemplateNotFoundException, GenerationFailedException

doc.title: Epic 6: Document Generation
doc.snippet: Factory pattern for adapter auto-discovery using reflection metadata. PdfAdapterFactory and ExcelAdapterFactory scan providers, find decorated classes, build registry, and provide cached adapter instances.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Document Generation
doc.snippet: PdfAdapterFactory with OnModuleInit lifecycle hook that scans providers, finds @RegisterPdfAdapter decorated classes, builds adapter registry. getAdapter() returns cached adapter instance via NestJS DI. ExcelAdapterFactory follows same pattern.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Document Generation
doc.snippet: AdapterNotFoundException(templateName, type), TemplateNotFoundException(templatePath), GenerationFailedException(message, context) for error handling in document generation flow.

doc.title: Testing Strategy
doc.snippet: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern for unit tests. Factory discovery and caching tests required. Test coverage target: 70%+ global, 80%+ for services.

doc.title: Implementation Patterns
doc.snippet: 8-group import order: Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events

doc.title: Story 6.2: Base PDF Adapter & Template Engine
doc.snippet: BasePdfAdapter pattern established. @RegisterPdfAdapter decorator uses reflection metadata. TemplateEngineService injection pattern ready. Module structure organized under src/modules/document-generator/.

file.reason: Interface that PDF adapters must implement. Defines templateName, styleName, generate(), getTemplatePath(), getStylePath() methods.
Abstract base class for PDF adapters. Provides template path resolution and TemplateEngineService injection. Concrete adapters extend this class.
Decorator factory that registers PDF adapters with reflection metadata PDF_ADAPTER_TEMPLATE_KEY. Used by PdfAdapterFactory for auto-discovery.
Service for EJS template rendering and Puppeteer PDF generation. Injected into BasePdfAdapter. Provides renderTemplate() and generatePdfFromHtml() methods.
Interface for Excel adapters. Similar pattern to IPdfAdapter but for Excel generation.
Abstract base class for Excel adapters. Provides workbook building helpers and generate() method implementation.
Decorator factory for Excel adapters. Uses EXCEL_ADAPTER_NAME_KEY reflection metadata.

package.name: @nestjs/core
package.reason: ModuleRef for provider scanning and DI

package.name: reflect-metadata
package.reason: Reflection metadata for decorator-based adapter registration

package.name: puppeteer
package.reason: HTML to PDF conversion (used by TemplateEngineService)

package.name: exceljs
package.reason: Excel workbook generation (used by Excel adapters)

constraints.constraint: Factory Pattern: Use NestJS ModuleRef to scan providers and discover adapters via reflection metadata
Reflection Metadata: Use PDF_ADAPTER_TEMPLATE_KEY and EXCEL_ADAPTER_NAME_KEY for adapter discovery
Instance Caching: First call creates adapter instance via NestJS DI, subsequent calls return cached instance
Lazy Initialization: Adapters instantiated on-demand via ModuleRef.get() for performance
Exception Handling: Custom exceptions extend HttpException for NestJS exception filter compatibility
Module Structure: Factories in factories/, exceptions in exceptions/, adapters in adapters/pdf/ and adapters/excel/
Import Organization: 8-group import order (Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events)
Testing: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, 70%+ coverage target, unit tests for factory discovery and caching

interface.name: IPdfAdapter
interface.signature: interface IPdfAdapter { readonly templateName: string; readonly styleName?: string; generate(templateName: string, data: any, lang: string): Promise<Buffer>; getTemplatePath(): string; getStylePath(): string | null; }

interface.name: IExcelAdapter
interface.signature: interface IExcelAdapter { readonly adapterName: string; generate(data: any, lang: string): Promise<Buffer>; buildWorkbook(workbook: ExcelJS.Workbook, data: any, lang: string): Promise<void>; }

interface.name: PdfAdapterFactory
interface.signature: class PdfAdapterFactory implements OnModuleInit { onModuleInit(): void; getAdapter(templateName: string): IPdfAdapter; getRegisteredTemplates(): string[]; }

interface.name: ExcelAdapterFactory
interface.signature: class ExcelAdapterFactory implements OnModuleInit { onModuleInit(): void; getAdapter(adapterName: string): IExcelAdapter; getRegisteredAdapters(): string[]; }

tests.standards: Unit tests use Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Test factory discovery via reflection metadata, adapter instance caching, exception handling. Coverage target: 70%+ global, 80%+ for services. Use Jest v29.x with @nestjs/testing for NestJS module setup. Mock ModuleRef and providers for isolation.

ideas.test: Test PdfAdapterFactory.onModuleInit() discovers @RegisterPdfAdapter decorated classes via reflection metadata
Test PdfAdapterFactory.getAdapter() returns cached instance on subsequent calls
Test PdfAdapterFactory.getRegisteredTemplates() lists all discovered template names
Test PdfAdapterFactory.getAdapter() throws AdapterNotFoundException when template not found
Test AdapterNotFoundException has correct status code (404) and message
Test TemplateNotFoundException has correct status code (404) and message
Test GenerationFailedException has correct status code (500) and context
Integration test: InvoicePdfAdapter discovered by PdfAdapterFactory
Integration test: SalesReportExcelAdapter discovered by ExcelAdapterFactory
Integration test: Example adapters generate documents correctly
